message.content:
{
  "page_type": "text_scan",
  "summary": "This is a page from a Haier air-cooled module commissioning manual, containing maintenance and operational notes, and listing attached documents. It provides instructions for heat exchanger cleaning, winter operation precautions, and general operational guidelines.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "header"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "maintenance_note"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "winter_operation_note"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "operation_management_note"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "contact_note"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "attached_documents_list"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "footer"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["maintenance_procedures", "operational_guidelines", "safety_precautions", "document_references"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "青岛海尔空调电子有限公司 风冷模块调试手册 第1次修订时间: 03.10.20 共15页 第16页\n☆ 机组换热器每年至少用洗洁精或高压水清洁两次, 以保持良好的换热效果。\n☆ 冬季开机请特别注意: 气温在0摄氏度以下要定期检查循环水保温效果, 且不能切断机组进电电源; 长期停机不用时, 必须放掉水侧换热器和系统管道内的水, 以免管道冻裂。\n☆ 机组应由专人操作、管理, 发现异常情况应及时停机并查明原因和排除故障。\n☆ 如遇无法解决之困难, 请随时与本公司用户服务部联系。\n附:《风冷一冷/热水多模块双压缩机系统空调控制器电控功能书》\n《风冷模块电控接线图》\n《风冷模块调试表》\n制冷百家网: www.zhilengbj.cn",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The page is purely textual with no diagrams or schematics. The 'attached_documents_list' references other documents not visible here.",
  "confidence": 1.0
}

parsed.summary: This is a page from a Haier air-cooled module commissioning manual, containing maintenance and operational notes, and listing attached documents. It provides instructions for heat exchanger cleaning, winter operation precautions, and general operational guidelines.
parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
青岛海尔空调电子有限公司 风冷模块调试手册 第1次修订时间: 03.10.20 共15页 第16页
☆ 机组换热器每年至少用洗洁精或高压水清洁两次, 以保持良好的换热效果。
☆ 冬季开机请特别注意: 气温在0摄氏度以下要定期检查循环水保温效果, 且不能切断机组进电电源; 长期停机不用时, 必须放掉水侧换热器和系统管道内的水, 以免管道冻裂。
☆ 机组应由专人操作、管理, 发现异常情况应及时停机并查明原因和排除故障。
☆ 如遇无法解决之困难, 请随时与本公司用户服务部联系。
附:《风冷一冷/热水多模块双压缩机系统空调控制器电控功能书》
《风冷模块电控接线图》
《风冷模块调试表》
制冷百家网: www.zhilengbj.cn
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The page is purely textual with no diagrams or schematics. The 'attached_documents_list' references other documents not visible here.
